ab: Namakamaan saw kisu a taini?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: Rakaten nu maku a taini.
en: I came on foot.

ab: Na u maan saw ku dadakawen nu misu a taini?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: Namakavasu kaku a taini.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: Maanen saw nu misu a tala cacudadan?
en: A: How do you get to school?

ab: Tupinen ni ama kaku.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: Makamaan saw cira a tayra i cacudadan tu kaluremiad?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: Maka cie-yun a tayra i cacudadan cira.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: Makamaan saw ci vayi nu misu a micakay tu dateng?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: Makaotovay cira a micakay tu dateng.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: A maanen saw nu misu a tara i Butud?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: A makalunan kaku a tara i Butud.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: A makamaan saw cira a tara i Butud?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: A makahikuki cira a tara i Butud.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: A makamaan saw cira a tara i Kausung?.
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: A maka kau-tie cira a tara i Kausung.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: Na u silamalay haw ku dakawen nira a tara i Pusung?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Hayi! Na u silamalay ku dakawen nira a tara i Pusung.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: Na u silamalay haw ku dakawen nira a tara i Pusung?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Caay isaw, na u hikuki ku dakawen nira a tara i Pusung.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: Sipangiruwan haw nu vasu i ngata?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: Hay, ira tu! vesuc han kina lalan, a mamelaw tu nu misu ku pangiruwan nu vasu.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: Icuwa saw ku sakangataay a cie-yun-can itini?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: Awaay ku cie-yun-can itini, a u takusi a cacay ku dadakawen nu misu.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: Anu makavasu kaku, a hacuwa saw ku tenes a tangasa i cacudadan?
ch: A:搭公車要多久才會到學校?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: Cacay a pulu’ ira ku lima a sasuritan tangasatu.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: Anu maka kaw-tie, a hacuwa saw ku tenes a tangasa i Taychung?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: Cacay a tatukiyan tangasa tu i Taychung.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: A hacuwa saw ku tenes anu makacidusiya a tara i Ulay?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: Cacay a tatukian kiyaru.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: A hacuwa saw ku tenes anu maka cie-yun kisu a tayni i luma’ nu maku?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: Tusa a pulu’ a sasuritan tangasatu.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes to get there.

ab: Mavana’ haw kisu a mivatikar?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: Hay! Mavana’ kaku a mivatikar.
en: B: Yes! I can ride a bicycle.

ab: Siotovay haw kisu?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Hay! Siotovay kaku.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: Siotovay haw kisu?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Caay kasiotovay kaku.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
